name: Banana Split Shake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Creamy Chocolate Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the condensed milk, banana slices, and ice cubes in a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Serve immediately.
4. Garnish as desired.
5. Refrigerate leftovers.
